publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-03-04 18:02:33 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Topical files, research notes, office files, correspondence, speeches, drafts of articles and other writings, and economic reports.
did.abstract: Papers include Golay's topical files concerning chiefly international economic development and relations, and Philippine development, history, and economics. Also, research notes, office files, correspondence, speeches, drafts of articles and other writings, and economic reports.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers include Golay's topical files concerning chiefly international economic development and relations, and Philippine development, history, and economics. Also, research notes, office files, correspondence, speeches, drafts of articles and other writings, and economic reports.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Frank H. Golay papers, #14-10-2760. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Some Costs of Philippine Politics - Various Versions
Public Finance Date, Post 1915, Statistical Bulletin
Mobilization of Resources; Customs Duties, Taxation
Philippines - Basic Data, Value of Imports and Exports
Philippines - Base Period Data for Calculating Indexes, 1919-45
Philippines: Summary Export Unit Value Indexes, 1899-1940
Philippines: Volume and Value of Exports, 1945-1960
Philippines: Volume and Value of Imports, 1945-1960
Philippines: Volume and Value of Imports, 1899-1920
Philippines: Volume and Value of Imports, 1990-1940
Draft Paper: CSIS (Center for the Strategic and International Studies) Seminar on Philippines Economical Development
The Great Discontent: the State of Economic Development
1980's Project of Council on Foreign Relations
Federal Reserve Bulletin: Problems Facing Post-Treaty Japan
Reviews: The U.S. and the Philippines
Tabulation or Philippine Laws in Preemptive Session of 1907
Reviews of the Philippines: Public Policy and National Economic Development
Pacific Affairs: Economic Consequences of the Philippines Trade Act"
Philippine Sociological Review: Economic Aspects of Philippine Agrarian Reform
Philippine Law Journal: The Case for Peso Devaluation
Philippine-American Affairs: The Case for Disengagement
Entrepreneurship and Economic Development in the Philippines
The Nature of Philippine Economic Nationalism
Jim Nach: The Philippines in Viet Nam, 1954-1966
Jim Nach: The Philippine Statehood Movement of 1971-1972
Philippine Commission, Annual Reports, 1904-1906 (for earlier reports, see "Taft as Governor" file)
Bureau of Insular Affairs [BIA] - Events of 1903-1908
BIA - The End of the Taft Era, 1910-1912
BIA - Transition to Democracy Party Rule, 1913-1914
Q's [Manuel Quézon] Report to the Legislature. Fall, 1931
Other Items on T.R. Jr's [Theodore Roosevelt] Administration
Genealogy - Xeroxed materials from Odell book)
